message: I'm ready to sell at a fair price. What are your thoughts on buying? Let's work together for a good deal!
That price was a bit high for me last round. I have a tight budget. Could you lower your ask a little? I'd like to keep trading but need prices closer to 10 or below to make it work.
Thank you for your feedback, B1! To facilitate further trading, I can lower my ask to 15 this round. Let's make a deal that works for us both!
Thanks for the offer, but 15 is still too steep for me. You asked 10 in round 1 and we made a great trade at 14. I can bid around 11-12 max. Let's keep trading consistently at lower
Thanks for your input, B1! I understand your budget constraints. How about I lower my ask to 12 this round? I hope this works for you, let's make a deal!

Thanks for coming down to 11! That trade worked well. If you could ask 10, I can bid 10 consistently every round for the rest of the game. Guaranteed trades, steady profit for both of us.
